flags.description: A comma-separated list of Maven scopes to exclude from the BOM. Dependencies in these scopes will not appear in the scan results.
flags.guidance: If the project has test-scoped dependencies and you want a production-only BOM, exclude the 'test' scope.

flags.description: Additional Maven command line arguments to pass to the mvn/mvnw command. Use this to activate profiles with -P<profileName>.
flags.guidance: If the project uses Maven profiles and a specific profile changes which dependencies are resolved, activate it with -P<name>.

flags.description: A comma-separated list of Maven sub-module names to exclude from the BOM. Modules listed here will be skipped during dependency tree parsing.
flags.guidance: If the project is multi-module and some modules (e.g. test utilities, integration test modules) should not appear in the production BOM, exclude them by name.
